data.title: 3 terrorism financiers convicted with onchain evidence. One sent $49,000 in stablecoins to ISIS-linked campaign via foreign exchange.
data.description: One of three individuals found guilty of financing terrorism transferred $49,000 in stablecoins to a foreign exchange, which was later directed to a campaign associated with ISIS.

data.title: Jukebox Print Expands Background Removal Engine for Print Workflows After Processing Millions of Images
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Richmond, British Columbia, Jukebox Print revealed the latest advancements in its background removal engine. This upgrade enhances the technology's speed, scalability, and precision for print preparation. The platform has successfully handled a substantial volume of data, solidifying its reputation as a premier solution in the print and production industry.

data.title: transcosmos speaks at the Shizuoka Prefecture XR (Cross Reality) Endowed Lecture Series, co-hosted by Shizuoka Institute of Science and Technology Group and Metaverse Japan
data.description: transcosmos revealed the significance of fostering creation and refining skills in the era of Artificial Intelligence, emphasizing Roblox's educational potential. The announcement made in Tokyo on April 7, 2026, underscored the importance of creator education in the extended reality (XR) era. The focus was on utilizing Roblox as a platform for learning.

data.title: transcosmos adds a new feature for collecting frontline logistics information to trans-logiManager, its logistics DX solution
data.description: A logistics DX solution called trans-logiManager was launched by transcosmos in October 2025 to enhance optimization of logistics costs. This system aids in tracking driver work hours related to delivery, standby, and loading activities, in addition to collecting loading-efficiency data. This technology serves the purpose of streamlining operations and improving efficiency. This development was shared in Tokyo on April 7, 2026.

data.title: Effat University Advances Digital Transformation with Ellucian Student and Finance Solutions
data.description: Effat University has recently introduced Ellucian Student, a SaaS-native student information system supplemented with AI capabilities, to manage the complete student lifecycle. This initiative aims to enhance operational efficiency and support financial governance within the university. Furthermore, the institution is implementing Ellucian Finance to bolster its financial processes.

data.title: U.S. News Unveils 2026 Best Graduate Schools
data.description: The latest release includes refreshed rankings for Sciences, Fine Arts, and specialized Business categories. On April 7, 2026, U.S. News & World Report revealed the 2026 Best Graduate Schools rankings. This esteemed source of rankings and consumer guidance shared insights into the top programs in various fields.

data.title: Call for Global Entries: Globee® Awards Invite Organizations Worldwide, Including Those Across the Middle East, to Nominate Their Business Achievements
data.description: San Francisco, April 6, 2026 - The Globee® Awards, a prestigious global business recognition program, has acknowledged outstanding accomplishments in varying industries on a local, regional, and international scale. The program, which garners worldwide participation, recently revealed the latest cohort of winners. This platform serves as a testament to the hard work and success of businesses across the globe, with a focus on honoring excellence in various sectors. The recognition by the Globee® Awards underscores the significance of these achievements amidst a competitive business landscape.

data.title: Biotalys Achieves First Milestone in Bioinsecticide Partnership with Syngenta
data.description: Biotalys has successfully reached a significant research milestone in its collaboration with Syngenta. This accomplishment marks a crucial step forward in their partnership.
Progress on repurchase program met weekly, aiming to cover share plans and decrease capital.

data.title: Press Release:  Sanofi’s lunsekimig met primary and key secondary endpoints in phase 2 respiratory studies in asthma and CRSwNP
data.description: Second-phase trials of lunsekimig, a new bispecific nanobody, successfully achieved the main objective and important secondary goals in two chronic respiratory illnesses.

data.title: TextMagic group’s sales results for Q1 2026
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, the group reported a 5% year-over-year decrease in unaudited consolidated revenue to €3,332 thousand, compared to €3,525 thousand in Q1 2025. The revenue of the Textmagic platform was impacted by fluctuations in foreign currency exchange rates. Had the exchange rates remained consistent with those of 2025, the revenue for Q1 2026 would have been €3,587 thousand, indicating a positive change of +2%.

data.title: Fresh findings in Libra investigation raise concerns about Milei connection, revealing 7 phone calls with Argentine president.
data.description: Recent revelations reported by The New York Times indicate that the Argentine president engaged in seven phone conversations with the entrepreneur responsible for the development of the Libra token.

data.title: Solana Foundation and Asymmetric Research launch STRIDE to enhance DeFi security amidst ongoing attacks.
data.description: The Solana Foundation, in collaboration with Web3 security firm Asymmetric Research, recently introduced a new security initiative named STRIDE. This initiative includes the establishment of a real-time incident-response network.
